name: lan-arcade
description: Offline LAN arcade mirror tooling and QA checks.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @lan-arcade/shared && npm run build -w @lan-arcade/arcade-api && npm run build -w @lan-arcade/companion
scripts.test: npm run test -w @lan-arcade/shared && npm run test -w @lan-arcade/arcade-api && npm run test -w @lan-arcade/companion
scripts.qa: npm run qa:static && npm run qa:smoke
